items.name: 妙勝寺山門
items.description: 天保13年（1842）建築、大工棟梁佐室村菅根秀助

en.description_en: This is a structure classified under tangible cultural property in Mutsuzawa Town, Chiba Prefecture. It is town-designated as a tangible cultural property of Mutsuzawa Town, designated on 2021-09-16.
